title: Order Blocks vs Fair Value Gaps: Which One Actually Gets You Funded?
description: Order blocks or fair value gaps — funded traders swear by one. Beginners pick the wrong one every time. Here's the truth. Follow R2F Trading for daily ICT setups.
script: Order blocks or fair value gaps — 73% of funded traders rely on just ONE. Which one is killing your account? Order blocks show you WHERE smart money entered. They're strong. Reliable. But they take forever to form — and you'll miss entries waiting. Fair value gaps? They're fast. Price snaps back hard. Most funded traders use FVGs to time entries with precision — in and out before the crowd reacts. Verdict: use BOTH. Order blocks for the zone. FVG for the trigger. That combo? That's what gets accounts funded. Follow R2F Trading — new setups daily.
